AppFunctionAppMetadata.appfn:description: Provides tools for creating, listing, and searching markdown notes, and appending to the Quick Note scratchpad. Operational Patterns: - Use 'listNotes' to discover existing notes in the notebook. - Use 'searchNotes' to find notes by title or content before editing. - Use 'createNote' to create a new markdown note with a title and optional content. - Use 'appendToQuickNote' to quickly capture text in the scratchpad. Constraints: - Note titles cannot be blank. - Search queries cannot be blank. - Notes are stored as markdown (.md) files in the user's notebook directory.
